rationale: The cited paper is used mainly as part of a broad literature review on tie strength and WOM, including a summary row in Table 1 and grouped citations in the discussion. The citing paper does not build its hypotheses, mechanism, measures, or design directly on Dubois et al. (2016); its core theory is about consensus language, perceived group size/diversity, and validity. So this citation serves background positioning rather than a distinct, paper-specific intellectual dependency.
